title: CDC Is a Feature Not a Product
summary: During and after my time as the lead of Debezium , a widely used open-source platform for Change Data Capture (CDC) for a variety of database, I got repeatedly asked whether I’d be interested in creating a company around CDC. VCs, including wellknown household names, did and do reach out to me, pitching this idea.
